title: Active capacities with no assigned workspaces
recommendation: Pause or delete empty capacities; they incur SKU charges with zero utilization.

title: Reviewer attested Pause/Resume but no Azure automation matched the capacity

evidence.reason: CAPACITY_AUTO_PAUSE_CONFIGURED is set, and the Azure ARM scan ran successfully, but no runbook or Logic App content referenced this tenant's Fabric capacities together with suspend/resume verbs. Either the automation lives in a subscription this user cannot read, the runbook content endpoint returned 403, or the attestation is stale.

recommendation: Either grant the signed-in user Reader on the subscription that hosts the automation account / Logic App and re-run, or unset CAPACITY_AUTO_PAUSE_CONFIGURED if the schedule no longer exists.

title: Non-production capacities (candidates for Pause/Resume)
recommendation: Configure an Azure Automation runbook or schedule to pause non-production capacities outside business hours.

title: Production-like workspaces not on a shared Fabric capacity
recommendation: Move production content to a Fabric capacity; PPU and personal workspaces do not scale and are tied to one user's license.

title: Large capacities (F64+) hosting fewer than 5 workspaces
recommendation: Right-size: either consolidate workspaces onto this capacity or downgrade the SKU.
